articles.title: Raiders sign first-round pick QB Fernando Mendoza - Raiders.com
articles.description: The 6-foot-5, 225-pound quarterback spent his final college season at Indiana (2025) after three years at California (2022-24), appearing in 36 career games with 35 starts and completing 691-of-1,008 passing attempts for 8,247 yards, 71 touchdowns and 22 inte…
articles.content:
HENDERSON, Nev. The Las Vegas Raiders have signed first round draft pick (1st overall) QB Fernando Mendoza, the club announced Thursday.
